sn38.16:1.1: "Kiṁ nu kho, āvuso sāriputta, imasmiṁ dhammavinaye dukkaran"ti?
sn38.16:1.7: "Kīvaciraṁ panāvuso, dhammānudhammappaṭipanno bhikkhu arahaṁ assā"ti? "Naciraṁ, āvuso"ti.
sn38.16:2.1:
Soḷasamaṁ.
Jambukhādakasaṁyuttaṁ samattaṁ.
Nibbānaṁ arahattañca,
dhammavādī kimatthiyaṁ;
Assāso paramassāso,
vedanā āsavāvijjā;
Taṇhā oghā upādānaṁ,
bhavo dukkhañca sakkāyo.
Imasmiṁ dhammavinaye dukkaranti.
